mapper.select: SELECT batch_task_id AS batchTaskId, batch_id AS batchId, zone_id AS zoneId, worker_id AS workerId, status, started_at AS startedAt, completed_at AS completedAt, tote_id AS toteId FROM batch_tasks WHERE status = 'UNASSIGNED' AND zone_id = #{zoneId} ORDER BY batch_task_id LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE batch_tasks SET worker_id = #{workerId}, status = 'IN_PROGRESS', started_at = NOW() WHERE batch_task_id = #{batchTaskId} AND status = 'UNASSIGNED'
UPDATE batch_tasks SET status = 'COMPLETED', completed_at = NOW() WHERE batch_task_id = #{batchTaskId} AND status = 'IN_PROGRESS'
